description: Golden queries for pipeline-level metrics. Runs cache-first (reuses data/raw-runs fixtures) so it is reproducible and free. knownArmenianSurnames are lower-cased substrings of people we have confirmed are real Armenian matches for the query — used to measure recall. Capture fixtures once with: node bench/run.mjs --capture

queries.query: Find Armenians who work at OpenAI
Armenian AI founders in San Francisco
